title: Zhan Family
content:
Zhan Family
 is one of the four Great Families of the 
Southern Domain
 of the 
Allheaven Star System
.

During the reign of 
Zhan Xingye
, the Zhan Family stood proud alongside the 
Thunder Celestial Temple
 and the 
Primordial Cultivation Family
. However, after Zhan Xingye comprehended the third Battle Scroll, he disappeared and the Zhan Family's status fell immensely.
